name: BMI Screening and Counseling Codes
description: CPT and HCPCS codes for BMI screening, weight assessment, and nutritional/physical activity counseling. Used in adult BMI assessment and child/adolescent weight assessment measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets
